======= RMA04395Michael Boyd papers23-16-4395Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections2B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:25:47 UTC. >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Michael Boyd papers
Boyd, Michael
Boyd, Verlaine
23-16-4395
4.2 cubic feet.
1957-2009 Collection includes sketchbooks, examples of Boyd's graphic designs, binders documenting his best known art pieces and course material, including slides. 10851181
Content Description
Collection includes sketchbooks, examples of Boyd's graphic designs, binders documenting his best known art pieces and course material, including slides.
Biographical / Historical
Professor emeritus in the Department of Design and Environmental Analysis in the College of Human Ecology from 1968-1995. During this time he continued to maintain a studio in New York City and his art is included in over 400 public or private collections. Born 1936, died in 2015.
Preferred Citation
Michael Boyd papers, #23-16-4395. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Related Materials
See also collections #23-2-2817 and #47-10-3394 for additional biographical information.
Universities and colleges -- Faculty. Drawings Artists. Design services -- Marketing Graphic arts. Slides (Photography) Boyd, Verlaine Boyd, Michael New York State College of Human Ecology. Design & Environmental Analysis
